name: Deep-Fried Dill Pickle Fondue Balls
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is from Heinz Pickles.
Combine the egg whites, Swiss cheese, chopped pickles, and garlic salt. Form small balls by dropping teaspoonfuls of the mixture into the bread crumbs and rolling them to coat well.
Chill until ready to serve.
Fry in deep fat (375 degrees) for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown. Drain on paper towels. Makes about 2 dozen appetizers.
